problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
hypothesis: If Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity is applied to subjective, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
